scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,api "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.test:smoke: playwright install chromium && playwright test e2e/smoke --reporter=line
scripts.build:dev: npm run build:mobile:dev && npx cap sync
scripts.build:preprod: npm run build:mobile:preprod && npx cap sync
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:mobile:prod && npx cap sync
scripts.ios:build:dev: npm run build:mobile:dev && dotenv -e .env.dev.capacitor -- npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:build:preprod: npm run build:mobile:preprod && dotenv -e .env.preprod.capacitor -- npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:build:prod: npm run build:mobile:prod && dotenv -e .env.prod.capacitor -- npx cap sync ios
scripts.android:build:dev: node scripts/patch-capgo-google-idtoken.mjs && npm run build:mobile:dev && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build:preprod: node scripts/patch-capgo-google-idtoken.mjs && npm run build:mobile:preprod && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build:prod: node scripts/patch-capgo-google-idtoken.mjs && npm run build:mobile:prod && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:run:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.wsl:android:run: adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && adb shell monkey -p com.one_more.app 1
scripts.wsl:android:run:clean: adb uninstall com.one_more.app || true && adb install android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && adb shell monkey -p com.one_more.app 1
scripts.wsl:android:dev: npm run build:preprod && npm run wsl:android:build && npm run wsl:android:run
scripts.wsl:android:dev:clean: npm run wsl:android:clean && npm run build:preprod && npm run wsl:android:build:clean && npm run wsl:android:run:clean
scripts.assets:generate: npx @capacitor/assets generate --iconBackgroundColor '#000000' --iconBackgroundColorDark '#000000' --splashBackgroundColor '#000000' --splashBackgroundColorDark '#000000' && rm -rf public/icons && mv icons public/icons && rm -f public/manifest.webmanifest && /bin/cp -f assets/logo.png public/logo.png
